query:
-- Remove duplicate SasBoss services that double-count costs already in S0917/S0918
-- SSZ8YPPU = duplicate DID Australia (1) — already captured in S0917 ($2 revenue)
-- SSQX7I94 = duplicate MC - SmileTel Executive User License — already captured in S0918 ($30 revenue)
DELETE FROM services WHERE externalId IN ('SSZ8YPPU', 'SSQX7I94');

-- Rename the mystery blank service to something transparent
UPDATE services 
SET planName = 'Access4 Unallocated Charges', 
    serviceType = 'Other',
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SS4E5XD2';

-- Recalculate DanKel C0075 stats
UPDATE customers SET
  monthlyCost    = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0)    FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  monthlyRevenue = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  serviceCount   = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  marginPercent  = ROUND(
    ((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived'))
     - (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')))
    / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')), 0)
    * 100, 2),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'C0075';

-- SSQX7I94 = duplicate MC - SmileTel Executive User License — already captured in S0918 ($30 revenue)

  monthlyCost    = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyCost), 0)    FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),
  monthlyRevenue = (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')),

    / NULLIF((SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0) FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0075' AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')), 0)
